transcript: I Run over should say actually Now can we have your name please the name the group is a mocha we're from west africa junior okay nice to meet you so tell me tell me why you come on the show this year so the first we came from west africa is living life there is like very difficult to live and It is very, very difficult to have something to eat. You see, like for us to be here for one day, we can help our family because they're suffering and we can have a good life too. Hi, what's your name? My name is Mamadi. Yeah! You know the prize, there's a million dollars, there's a residency in Vegas. Can I ask, what is kind of the dream here? Do you mean if we win? Yeah. Like it's a big dream for us first to be here and it's going to be a big dream for us if we win this. We want to build a school because we don't have space to train. We just went straight to train by ourselves. We don't have any teacher here, you see. All right, yeah. I don't want to ask too many questions because I love being surprised. Just do it, please. All right, let's do this. Just give us a second, we back. I wonder what are they going to do? Runnin' like a horse, don't give a Should've said I'd make it like that Oh, you know the water is fagin' Trains that are crazy trains Hope we'll never reach on Cavan So now we let it all go free Give me the tingle, make me rockin' like a dance Give me the tingle, make me rockin' like a dance Won't you talk, I'll tell you how to dance Give me the tingle, make me rock You made a tingle in me You made a tingle in me You made a tingle in me You made a tingle in me You made a tingle in me You made a tingle in me You made a tingle in me We'll be right back. Oh, my God, look at that. Oh, what is happening? We will rise up like giants so tall Mountains will move and tribes will follow Visually, having you guys in these outfits, hopping around was like, wow. I loved it. And when there were three on top of each other, falling, I mean, it looked crazy insane. I loved it. That was spectacular. It was super fun. There was also a little bit of suspense. I am so happy that you got together to come to AGT because this is the place perfect for you guys. People are going to go crazy with it. We have one issue, which is we've seen so many incredible acts this is going to be a nightmare deciding who's going to be in the final having said that you've really given yourselves a shot in my opinion it was an amazing audition really amazing i'm going to remember this for a long time Now we have to vote Mighty It's a yes from me Sophia Spectacular Now we have to vote. Heidi? It's a yes from me! Sophia? Spectacular! Yes! I'm going to work out, based on the people here, you! Thank you, thank you so much! The fact that they train in the streets! They have to be in the life zone! They don't even have a trainer. Bye! That's amazing. Oh, you guys. All right, thank you, all right. Change is gonna come. Change is gonna come. Change is gonna come.
